# imageSize

**Type Property**

The standard width and height for images in an inset interface.

## Declaration

```swift
class var imageSize: CGSize { get }
```

## Discussion

The standard image size for inset items is 1740 x 560 points. For more information about configuring the images for an inset interface, see [https://developer.apple.com/design/human-interface-guidelines/tvos/icons-and-images/top-shelf-images/].
title: imageSize
